# Volt LOS journey optimisations

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: November 26, 2024 3:36 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: December 5, 2024 10:50 AM

# **What problem are we solving?**

1. Journey completion %
2. Reduce customer support queries
3. Reduce 
4. Reduce loan application journey time
    1. Reduce number of stages
    2. Reduce time spent per screen/stage of journey, 
5. Clear and easy to understand screens: info, warnings, hierarchy.
6. Maintain high user psych till journey completion
    1. Easy education.
    2. High motivation.
    3. Trust and comfort.
    4. Delight.
7. User has to drop-off and come back to refresh portfolio - bad UX, 0 education

# Data

1. Funnels
    - Analyse drop-offs.
    - “Need help” click count per page :: Query type% breakdown.
2. User calls 
    1. Understand pain points.
    2. What do they look for while taking a loan.
3. Screen-wise UX UI breakdown
[https://www.figma.com/board/BjlFt8UzeBYbUf2vVot06i/Karuna-UR-Journey-Analysis?node-id=0-1&node-type=canvas&t=U5GJxAcpvIIbXObK-0](https://www.figma.com/board/BjlFt8UzeBYbUf2vVot06i/Karuna-UR-Journey-Analysis?node-id=0-1&node-type=canvas&t=U5GJxAcpvIIbXObK-0)
4. Customer support tickets
5. Sales team insights
6. Benchmarking competitors and other loan journeys
[https://www.figma.com/design/7jG6NbNx7iwRRZ6MDqJkvW/UI%2FUX-benchmarking?node-id=51-2](https://www.figma.com/design/7jG6NbNx7iwRRZ6MDqJkvW/UI%2FUX-benchmarking?node-id=51-2)
    - Key takeaways
7. 

# Solution:

| Solutions | Priority | Impact | Effort |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| MF Central
- Fetching for loan offer
- Pledge error handling
- Dropped off user returning
- Global refresh limit | P0 | HIgh | Low |
| Reduce ToFU effort:
- Minimise screens until offer generation |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |

- Cred KYC is done on their UI - probably an XML approach
- FAQ: How does LAMF affect credit score
